chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7335 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of Misc.No.31049/2022 3.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Tariq Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) This petition has been filed by an entity represented to be an auction participant and on grievance of being unsuccessful has had customs auction restrained since 2022. The law provides for the manner in which such auctions are to be held and dealt with and any grievance ought to be agitated before the concerned forum in the first instance. No case for direct recourse in writ jurisdiction is made out. This petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
